name: redline
description: REDLINE — multiplayer 3D arcade racer with vehicular combat. Three.js + Cannon.js + Socket.IO.
author: Victor Galvez <hello@victorgalvez.dev>

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "client,server" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix client" "cd server && node src/index.js"
